title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI tools to accelerate development velocity, with projections of 40% more capabilities in 2026. High-adoption teams are deploying daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6 times faster than baseline.
